title: RCH Side Navigation Menu
prompt: Design a side navigation drawer (hamburger menu) for the RCH app, styled after the sidebar in {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}. It should have a dark, high-tech aesthetic with neon cyan accents ({{DATA:THEME:THEME_2}}). The menu should include links for: Home, Missions, Checklists, Webmap, Topics, Files, Chat, Users, Configure, Connect, and About. Include a header with the 'Reticulum Community Hub' logo and name. The background should be a translucent dark overlay.
